quotes: its very good app clean and simple but it will be more beneficial if they add grouping system in watchlists like kite have launched recently
Excellent application. unfortunately I closed my trading account. Now I want to reopen my trading account. But there are no option to reopen
Recently what I observed is generally liquid fund takes 1 working day exit but in groww it takes almost 2 to 3 days? what is the reason behind it?
action_ideas: Implement a watchlist grouping feature to enhance user organization and navigation within the app.
Develop a clear, accessible process for users to reopen previously closed trading accounts.
Investigate and optimize liquid fund exit processing times to meet industry standards and user expectations.

explanation_bullets: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year.
Nil exit load if redeemed after 1 year from the date of allotment.
Exit load of 1% is deducted from the redemption amount at the prevailing NAV.
No exit load (Nil) — redemption is free at any time.
